title: oligospermum crista-galli
intro: Oligospermum crista-galli, also known as Crested Cock's Comb, is a plant species in the daisy family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Oligospermum crista-galli include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular remedy for colds and flu. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
